simple_types.name: CR_CALEVSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CR_CALEVSEL_Field is
   WEEK,
   MONTH,
   YEAR)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: WEEK
enumeration_literals.description: Month change (every 01 of each month at time 00:00:00)

enumeration_literals.name: MONTH
enumeration_literals.description: Year change (every January 1 at time 00:00:00)

simple_types.name: CR_KEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type CR_KEY_Field is
   CR_KEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 8;

enumeration_literals.name: CR_KEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description: Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation.

simple_types.name: CR_TIMEVSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CR_TIMEVSEL_Field is
   MINUTE,
   HOUR,
   MIDNIGHT,
   NOON)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: MINUTE
enumeration_literals.description: Hour change

enumeration_literals.name: HOUR
enumeration_literals.description: Every day at midnight

enumeration_literals.name: MIDNIGHT
enumeration_literals.description: Every day at noon

simple_types.name: CR_VROFF_Field
simple_types.code:
type CR_VROFF_Field is
   NO_EFFECT,
   STOP_VREG)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO_EFFECT
enumeration_literals.description:
if KEY is correct, asserts the vddcore_nreset and stops the voltage
regulator.

simple_types.name: CR_XTALSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type CR_XTALSEL_Field is
   NO_EFFECT,
   CRYSTAL_SEL)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO_EFFECT
enumeration_literals.description:
if KEY is correct, switches the slow clock on the crystal oscillator
output.

simple_types.name: MR_BODDIS_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_BODDIS_Field is
   ENABLE,
   DISABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description: the core brownout detector is disabled.

simple_types.name: MR_BODRSTEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_BODRSTEN_Field is
   NOT_ENABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NOT_ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description:
the core reset signal, vddcore_nreset is asserted when a brownout detection
occurs.

simple_types.name: MR_KEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_KEY_Field is
   MR_KEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 8;

enumeration_literals.name: MR_KEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation.Always
reads as 0.

simple_types.name: MR_OSCBYPASS_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_OSCBYPASS_Field is
   NO_EFFECT,
   BYPASS)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO_EFFECT
enumeration_literals.description: the 32-KHz XTAL oscillator is selected and is put in bypass mode.

simple_types.name: MR_VDDIORDY_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_VDDIORDY_Field is
   VDDIO_REMOVED,
   VDDIO_PRESENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: VDDIO_REMOVED
enumeration_literals.description:
VDDIO is present (used before going to backup mode when backup batteries
are used)

simple_types.name: SMMR_SMIEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type SMMR_SMIEN_Field is
   NOT_ENABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NOT_ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description:
the SUPC interrupt signal is asserted when a supply monitor detection
occurs.

simple_types.name: SMMR_SMRSTEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type SMMR_SMRSTEN_Field is
   NOT_ENABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NOT_ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description:
the core reset signal, vddcore_nreset is asserted when a supply monitor
detection occurs.

simple_types.name: SMMR_SMSMPL_Field
simple_types.code:
type SMMR_SMSMPL_Field is
   SMD,
   CSM,
   Val_32SLCK,
   Val_256SLCK,
   Val_2048SLCK)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: SMD
enumeration_literals.description: Continuous Supply Monitor

enumeration_literals.name: CSM
enumeration_literals.description: Supply Monitor enabled one SLCK period every 32 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_32SLCK
enumeration_literals.description: Supply Monitor enabled one SLCK period every 256 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_256SLCK
enumeration_literals.description: Supply Monitor enabled one SLCK period every 2,048 SLCK periods

simple_types.name: SR_ACKUPD_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_ACKUPD_Field is
   FREERUN,
   UPDATE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: FREERUN
enumeration_literals.description: Time and calendar registers can be updated.

simple_types.name: SR_ALARM_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_ALARM_Field is
   NO_ALARMEVENT,
   ALARMEVENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO_ALARMEVENT
enumeration_literals.description: An alarm matching condition has occurred.

simple_types.name: SR_BODRSTS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_BODRSTS_Field is
   NO,
   PRESENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO
enumeration_literals.description:
at least one brownout output rising edge event has been detected since the
last read of the SUPC_SR.

simple_types.name: SR_CALEV_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_CALEV_Field is
   NO_CALEVENT,
   CALEVENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO_CALEVENT
enumeration_literals.description: At least one calendar event has occurred since the last clear.

simple_types.name: SR_FWUPIS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_FWUPIS_Field is
   LOW,
   HIGH)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: LOW
enumeration_literals.description: FWUP input is tied high.

simple_types.name: SR_FWUPS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_FWUPS_Field is
   NO,
   PRESENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO
enumeration_literals.description:
at least one wake-up due to the assertion of the FWUP pin has occurred
since the last read of SUPC_SR.

simple_types.name: SR_OSCSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_OSCSEL_Field is
   RC,
   CRYST)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: RC
enumeration_literals.description: the slow clock, SLCK is generated by the 32-kHz crystal oscillator.

simple_types.name: SR_RSTTYP_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_RSTTYP_Field is
   GeneralReset,
   BackupReset,
   WatchdogReset,
   SoftwareReset,
   UserReset)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: GeneralReset
enumeration_literals.description: Return from Backup Mode

enumeration_literals.name: BackupReset
enumeration_literals.description: Watchdog fault occurred

enumeration_literals.name: WatchdogReset
enumeration_literals.description: Processor reset required by the software

enumeration_literals.name: SoftwareReset
enumeration_literals.description: NRST pin detected low

simple_types.name: SR_SEC_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_SEC_Field is
   NO_SECEVENT,
   SECEVENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO_SECEVENT
enumeration_literals.description: At least one second event has occurred since the last clear.

simple_types.name: SR_SMOS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_SMOS_Field is
   HIGH,
   LOW)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: HIGH
enumeration_literals.description:
the supply monitor detected VDDUTMI lower than its threshold at its last
measurement.

simple_types.name: SR_SMRSTS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_SMRSTS_Field is
   NO,
   PRESENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO
enumeration_literals.description:
at least one supply monitor detection has generated a core reset since the
last read of the SUPC_SR.

simple_types.name: SR_SMS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_SMS_Field is
   NO,
   PRESENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO
enumeration_literals.description: at least one supply monitor detection since the last read of SUPC_SR.

simple_types.name: SR_SMWS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_SMWS_Field is
   NO,
   PRESENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO
enumeration_literals.description:
at least one wake-up due to a supply monitor detection has occurred since
the last read of SUPC_SR.

simple_types.name: SR_TIMEV_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_TIMEV_Field is
   NO_TIMEVENT,
   TIMEVENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO_TIMEVENT
enumeration_literals.description: At least one time event has occurred since the last clear.

simple_types.name: SR_WKUPIS0_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_WKUPIS0_Field is
   DIS,
   EN)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DIS
enumeration_literals.description:
the corresponding wake-up input was active at the time the debouncer
triggered a wake-up event.

simple_types.name: SR_WKUPS_Field
simple_types.code:
type SR_WKUPS_Field is
   NO,
   PRESENT)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NO
enumeration_literals.description:
at least one wake-up due to the assertion of the WKUP pins has occurred
since the last read of SUPC_SR.

simple_types.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type WPMR_WPKEY_Field is
   WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WPEN bit.Always reads as 0.

simple_types.name: WUIR_WKUPEN0_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUIR_WKUPEN0_Field is
   DISABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DISABLE
enumeration_literals.description:
the corresponding wake-up input forces the wake-up of the core power
supply.

simple_types.name: WUIR_WKUPT0_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUIR_WKUPT0_Field is
   HIGH_TO_LOW,
   LOW_TO_HIGH)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: HIGH_TO_LOW
enumeration_literals.description:
a low to high level transition for a period defined by WKUPDBC on the
correspond-ing wake-up input forces the wake-up of the core power supply.

simple_types.name: WUMR_FWUPDBC_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUMR_FWUPDBC_Field is
   IMMEDIATE,
   Val_3_SCLK,
   Val_32_SCLK,
   Val_512_SCLK,
   Val_4096_SCLK,
   Val_32768_SCLK)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: IMMEDIATE
enumeration_literals.description: FWUP shall be low for at least 3 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_3_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: FWUP shall be low for at least 32 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_32_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: FWUP shall be low for at least 512 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_512_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: FWUP shall be low for at least 4,096 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_4096_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: FWUP shall be low for at least 32,768 SLCK periods

simple_types.name: WUMR_FWUPEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUMR_FWUPEN_Field is
   NOT_ENABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NOT_ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description: the Force Wake-up pin low forces the wake-up of the core power supply.

simple_types.name: WUMR_RTCEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUMR_RTCEN_Field is
   NOT_ENABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NOT_ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description: the RTC alarm signal forces the wake-up of the core power supply.

simple_types.name: WUMR_RTTEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUMR_RTTEN_Field is
   NOT_ENABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NOT_ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description: the RTT alarm signal forces the wake-up of the core power supply.

simple_types.name: WUMR_SMEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUMR_SMEN_Field is
   NOT_ENABLE,
   ENABLE)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NOT_ENABLE
enumeration_literals.description: the supply monitor detection forces the wake-up of the core power supply.

simple_types.name: WUMR_WKUPDBC_Field
simple_types.code:
type WUMR_WKUPDBC_Field is
   IMMEDIATE,
   Val_3_SCLK,
   Val_32_SCLK,
   Val_512_SCLK,
   Val_4096_SCLK,
   Val_32768_SCLK)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: IMMEDIATE
enumeration_literals.description: WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 3 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_3_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 32 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_32_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 512 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_512_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 4,096 SLCK periods

enumeration_literals.name: Val_4096_SCLK
enumeration_literals.description: WKUPx shall be in its active state for at least 32,768 SLCK periods

array_types.name: SUPC_SR_WKUPIS_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type SUPC_SR_WKUPIS_Field_Array is array (0 .. 15) of SR_WKUPIS0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 16;

array_types.name: SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type SUPC_WUIR_WKUPEN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 15) of WUIR_WKUPEN0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 16;

array_types.name: SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT_Field_Array is array (0 .. 15) of WUIR_WKUPT0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 16;

fields.name: NRSTL
fields.description: Read-only. Software Reset Command in Progress

RTC_CALR_Register

RTC_IDR_Register
RTC_IER_Register

RTC_TIMR_Register
RTC_VER_Register
RTC_WPMR_Register

SUPC_Peripheral

fields.name: CR
fields.description: Supply Controller Supply Monitor Mode Register

record_types.name: SUPC_SMMR_Register
SUPC_SR_Register

fields.name: WKUPS
fields.description: Read-only. Supply Monitor Detection Wake-up Status

record_types.name: SUPC_SR_WKUPIS_Field
SUPC_WUIR_Register

SUPC_WUIR_WKUPT_Field

variables.name: GPBR_Periph
variables.code:
GPBR_Periph : aliased GPBR_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => GPBR_Base;

variables.name: RSTC_Periph
variables.code:
RSTC_Periph : aliased RSTC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RSTC_Base;

variables.name: RTC_Periph
variables.code:
RTC_Periph : aliased RTC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RTC_Base;

variables.name: RTT_Periph
variables.code:
RTT_Periph : aliased RTT_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RTT_Base;

variables.name: SUPC_Periph
variables.code:
SUPC_Periph : aliased SUPC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => SUPC_Base;

variables.name: WDT_Periph
variables.code:
WDT_Periph : aliased WDT_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => WDT_Base;
